/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,librover_perception_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o librover_perception_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/rover_perception_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/rover_perception_msgs/msg/terrain_grid__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rover_perception_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/rover_perception_msgs/msg/led_detection__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rover_perception_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/rover_perception_msgs/msg/led_detection_array__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/joshua/rover_ws/build/rover_perception_msgs:/opt/ros/humble/lib: librover_perception_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libnav_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libnav_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
